title: prunella vulgaris var. hispida
intro: Prunella vulgaris var. hispida is a variety of the common self-heal plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Prunella vulgaris var. hispida include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Prunella vulgaris var. hispida can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
